programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With a night of torture behind them and a morning packed with PT, the All-Stars set their sights on the mission ahead. When Don introduces a 200-meter shooting evolution using Ace Precision Firearms, the group is eager—though they didn’t expect an air mattress to be part of the equation. Later, Nemo Arms ups the ante with a challenge featuring three of their firearms and a rugged desert terrain course of fire. Just as the contestants begin to wind down for the day, Olight steps in to illuminate the path to the next round of challenges.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: This morning, the All-Stars are pulled up by their bootstraps to compete for a chance to win The Golden Boy. Who will rise to the occasion in this Western-themed challenge and take home a piece of true American craftsmanship? Next, the training turns cerebral with the help of BlazePod. With mental fortitude playing a critical role in mission success, Don goes above and beyond to ensure the contestants are mentally—and physically—ready for battle. Later, the team is introduced to a groundbreaking product designed to reduce draw time while under enemy fire.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: In the season premiere of Farm Hero, host Laura Zaspel scours the country for the best farming practices and the people behind them. Her search winds her up in Gunnison Colorado at Parker pastures. Bill Parker and his daughters are fighting desertification with their grass-fed livestock. Using a collaboration with local farmers, Bill fights against the stigma of livestock farming with a holistic approach. Parker pastures breathes new air into the concept of farm-to-table.

programme.title: Preview for "Autumn Exhilaration" 2 Hour Nature Film
programme.desc: Available on October 30th, 2021 -The exhilaration of autumn in the Colorado Rockies and High Sierras awaits you in our latest film release! Soar over the brilliant aspen forests of Colorado, immerse yourself in the glowing autumn leaves, and bask in the golden light of sunrise on the high mountain peaks. The inspiring scenery is accompanied by a soothing ambient music soundtrack. Available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv. Runtime 2.5 Hours.

programme.title: Waterfall Relaxation - 2 Hour Nature Film with Relaxing Nature Sounds
programme.desc: Unwind with the sights and sounds of a spectacular cascading waterfall in Northern California. Burney falls is a spring fed waterfall that has been referred to as the "eighth wonder of the world". This new release also features scenes from Manzanita Lake in Lassen National Park, a scenic high alpine lake with abundant bird life. Relaxing waterfall sounds and bird songs make this a wonderful escape from the pressures of daily life.

programme.title: Nature's Abstracts
programme.desc: This 2 hour moving art film immerses you in the wondrous abstract patterns found in nature through the fine art photography of Elizabeth Carmel.

programme.title: Preview for Arches & Canyonlands
programme.desc: The sublime landscape of Arches and Canyonlands area of Utah is the star in this 90 minute film, which showcases awe-inspiring natural arches, dramatic canyon vista sunrises & sunsets, and flights through arches and over the Colorado River canyon. The spectacular cinematography is accompanied by beautiful Native American flute music. Note: All Drone footage was filmed outside of National and State Park boundaries. Runtime 90 minutes. Available now to subscribers via www.NatureStream.tv.

programme.title: Preview for "Alaska" Art Display Film
programme.desc: This is a preview for the 1 hour long Art Display Film "Alaska". Journey into the beautiful wilderness of Alaska through the photography of Olof & Elizabeth Carmel. This art display film showcases their most stunning photographs of Americas last great wilderness - from breaching whales and misty mountains of the Inside Passage to the Grizzlies and soaring peaks of Denali National Park. This 60 minute film will give you new appreciation for the wilderness of the wild North. Accompanied by a beautiful acoustic guitar soundtrack. To see the full film please subscribe to NatureStream.tv Streaming Channel, with free apps for all streaming devices, at www.NatureStream.tv

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach presented by Bonsoy 2025
programme.desc: Bells Beach on Victoria's South Coast is the longest-running surfing competition and will host the 62st edition this year. Bells is Australian surfing heritage. With the hope of scoring long-period, groomed walls, the surfers will need to display the perfect combination of power, precision, and timing. The biggest surfing legends have had the honor of winning and ringing ‘The Bell' and 2025 will see a hungry new generation vying for the opportunity to cement their names in one of surfing's most prestigious events.

programme.title: 2019 Drug Aware Margaret River Pro Finals | REPLAY

programme.title: African Renaissance | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 3
programme.desc: Sam, Easkey, and Adrien catch up with West African surf legend Oumar Seye, the first West African sponsored surfer. Seye has impacted the surf culture in Senegal in more ways than one, both proving the sport can be more than a hobby and supporting sustainability by banning plastic bags at his surf events. They end their trip in Popenguine, a bohemian beach town where an incredible women-led initiative to plant thousands of trees has made the area one of the greenest parts of the country.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil starts to think of what could have been when an old neighborhood kid returns to town as a hugely successful Internet billionaire; Jay feels Manny could use some constructive criticism; Cameron is offended when Mitchell questions his childhood.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family realizes that everyone will be elsewhere for Christmas and if they want to celebrate it together, they must celebrate it that day; everyone sets off with their duties for Express Christmas which creates quite a site that evening.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil jumps to conclusions after a doctor's visit and begins saying his goodbyes; Javier comes unannounced to take Manny to the horse races; Mitchell wins an environmental law award and a competition to see who has the bigger trophy ensues.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny are challenged with a school project, but when Claire and Jay learn about it, their competitive spirit takes over; Phil recruits Haley and Gloria to sit-in on a real estate presentation; Mitch and Cam meet with possible birth mothers.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family helps Claire with her debate for the town council seat, but may do more harm than good; Lily learns her first expletive and Mitch and Cam don't know how to deal with it; Jay is concerned with Stella's recent behavior and blames Gloria.
